mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sms_verification_code (phone, code, purpose, expires_at, used, created_at) VALUES (#{phone}, #{code}, #{purpose}, #{expiresAt}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, code, purpose, expires_at, used, created_at FROM sms_verification_code WHERE phone = #{phone} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND used = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sms_verification_code SET used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sms_verification_code SET used = 1 WHERE phone = #{phone} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND used = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_verification_code WHERE phone = #{phone} AND created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutesAgo} MINUTE)
